title: Vendor buildah, imagebuilder, docker/docker, fsouza and more
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Vendors in Buidah, imagebuilder, fsouza/docker-client, docker/docker and
a few more related.  Of particular note, changes to the TweakCapabilities()
function from docker/docker along with the parse.IDMappingOptions() function
from Buildah.  Please pay particular attention to the related changes in
the call from libpod to those functions during the review.

Passes baseline tests.

comments.body:
One dependency seems to be missing: 
```
?? vendor/golang.org/x/sys/windows/registry/
```
repushed, we'll see how long the tests last this time....
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2625) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
